articles.title: Sentences of boys spared custody over rape referred to Court of Appeal
articles.description: The sentences of boys spared custody over the rape of two girls in Hampshire will be referred to the Court of Appeal, the prime minister has said.

articles.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
articles.description: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

articles.title: 'Bullying' and 'overbearing' behaviour behind abrupt BP chairman removal
articles.description: BP declined to comment on whether bullying behaviour was part of the reason for his immediate dismissal.

articles.title: Three teens dead after being in water at beauty spots
articles.description: Three teenagers were found in water in separate incidents across England on Bank Holiday Monday.
